entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite; Iterate over Value and write i...
entry.content: I think Ryan was suggesting to map the entire payload using XSLT. But if you have mapped the records to have a maximum of 4 Produkts per records so the visual mapping won't fail, you can use the graphical mapping after the xslt step. Each record should be bound 1...4 from a product perspective right? Thanks, Marty

entry.title: Re: Initial Release of SAP Analytics Cloud Just Ask

Hi Vsrini,
Could it be that these models are live models ? Only acquired data models can be indexed.

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite; Iterate over Value and write i...
entry.content: The incoming message contains too many values to map them in a simple xslt script. The point is that the amount of the products can vary. The script is working quite good, i just need to put the payload in to the payload which will be created after the static mapping which is processed in a different route.

entry.title: Re: Einladung zum SAP Integration Suite Day – 18. April 2024
entry.content: @rajmohandwivedi Thanks for the hint, please find the registration link here: https://training.sap.com/course/wdsisd

entry.title: bulk items and subcontracting PO
entry.content:
GOOD DAY EXPECTS

Need assistance please, been struggling to issue bulk items on subcontracting PO's, mainly because the bulk tick is in the MM and not the BOM, we do not want to remove the bulk tick from mm but also want to be able to issue this items to vendor. how do we handle this without issuing to a cost center?

 

also is there a report I can run to see this bulk items that are linked to subcontracting orders?

thanking you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Report header and extended attribute
entry.content:
Hi Alexandre,

now I see what you mean. And I am afraid, that you are able to insert only those values available under the Insert button. See screenshot header.png. However, the cardinality between ext.attribute on Entity and header on Model still doesn`t match. One model (=one value) vs. many entities (=many values of your extended attribute). You would still need to transform it for example into the extended attribute of a Model. And for Model, you have Name and Code values, which can be inserted into the header. So if you don`t mind sacrifying Model Name or Model Code to your purpose, you can do it. In PD, you can display only Names or Codes at one time, but not both. The only exception is Model properties dialog, but I suppose it is almost not used. Or very little, during the model creation mainly. So here is your hack.

HTH,

Ondrej Divis

P.S. It is very unlucky, that you cannot reply directly to specific aswer, if you need to attach a screenshot in this new forum... SAP should work on this soon.

entry.title: Re: SAP Transportation Management in SAP S/4HANA 2022 - Highlights
entry.content:
Hello, 

It seems the scenarios below are not yet supported. 

  • Stock Transport Orders are not yet supported for scenarios with EWM.
  • Stock Transport Scheduling Agreements  are not yet supported.
  • The returns process for Stock Transport Order and Stock Transport Scheduling Agreements is not yet supported

Is there a plan to extend the functionality to include these scenarios?

Regards

Matt

entry.title: Re: How to use Cloud SDK OpenAPI Client with CAP?
entry.content:
The issue has been resolved with the following output directory:

<outputDirectory>${project.basedir}/src/gen/java</outputDirectory>

entry.title: Re: Using BAPIs in RAP
entry.content:
Hi,

We are on S/4HANA FOUNDATION 2022 02 (05/2023). I can see the failed as a changing parameter in the SAVE method in CL_ABAP_BEHAVIOR_SAVER. However, when I try to use it in the impl. class, I get an error saying "failed is unknown. Any ideas why this might happen?

PS: It is working with CL_ABAP_BEHAVIOR_SAVER_FAILED. Aplogies. Thank you.


Thanks and regards

Sathya

entry.title: Re: EXIT_SAPLL03T_002 - value cannot change in LTAP table
entry.content:
This FM is executed in update task AFTER standard update of data, so not suitable for your requireent.

(This FM is suitable to update your own tables after standard update)

entry.title: API for materialdocuments with movementtype 309 with warehouse management S4 Hana public cloud
entry.content:
Hi, we have to create mass material documents to book material to material (movement typ 309), in MM or directly in the warehouse. We are using public cloud with embedded warehouse management.

 

For MM there is the API material document create - but the delivery document is not created in the WHS.

If I try API warehouse task create direct in WHS - there is no API where I can create the corresponding delivery and the warehouse tasks.

Also I could not find an CDS view I can use to select the deliveries created from MM in WHS. Has somebody experience with this topic?

entry.title: Re: Technical User Date & Time format Settings Change in C4C
entry.content:
Hi Ananthu,

I am getting authorization error. Is there a way to assign the admin rights to access and edit the Settings to the technical user?

Error

 

Thank you

Regards

Pratyush SINHA

entry.title: Re: CDS view - remove entries based on duplicates
entry.content:
Hello Sankar,

I understand that you need to remove adjancent duplicates from your data.

For acheiving this there is ROW_NUMBER() function in SQL. attaching code for reference.

output table = 

select
             client as client ,
             bukrs AS bukrs,
             ANLN1  AS ANLN1,
             ANLN2  AS ANLN2,
             AFABE as AFABE,
             BZDAT as BZDAT,
             row_number ( ) OVER ( PARTITION BY client, BUKRS, ANLN1, ANLN2, AFABE
                                 ORDER BY BZDAT ASC ) AS rank_asc
             from faav_anep;

        select
            client as client ,
            bukrs AS bukrs,
            ANLN1  AS ANLN1,
          ANLN2  AS ANLN2,
           AFABE as AFABE,
          BZDAT as FDT
           from :output_table
             WHERE rank_asc = 1 ;

entry.title: Re: Bloqueio de inserção em Subtipo de problemas (OPST) -...
entry.content:
Olá, Vinicius.

Realmente, não há um objeto específico para os subtipos, portanto, não há como interagir com essa tabela diretamente.

Talvez, usando a OSCL (obj: 191), você consiga bloquear a criação ou atualização de chamados que estejam fora de um range de subtipos. EX: A empresa trabalha com os subtipos de 1 a 3. Se um quarto for adicionado, o usuário não conseguirá finalizar a transação de adição/update do chamado. Para deixar essa regra mais consistente, você poderia ainda especificar na Transaction quais os subtipos válidos, a fim de evitar que o usuário altere o nome ou descrição dos subtipos pré-determinados pela empresa.

Espero que faça sentido.

Felipe

Helinna

entry.title: Annual Sales listing Belgium no results
entry.content:
When running statutory reporting- BE Annual Sales list the following error appears:

No data found for reporting from the query BE_SL_ANNUAL_REP_CA_QRY for the period.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Annual Sales listing Belgium no results
entry.content:
Please note, that the Message displayed in the log - "No data found for reporting from the query BE_SL_ANNUAL_REP_CA_QRY for the period" - is an information message to provide details of:

1. Data not stored for Reported Item Log Table ( Used for Audit Purpose )

2. Also Provides detailed info on what is the impact and where to check( In this case it is Admin )

 

If you think the message is more technical than business terms, please raise change request via https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/2260

entry.title: Re: Cloud Manual Bank Reconciliation Configuration
entry.content:
Hi,

 

you should rather give an example of what exactly you want to be posted how. Then someone can also help you. 

 

Basically nothing has changed compared to earlier. Besides the fact that you can now use more modern processing rules instead of configuring it via the posting rules. 

 

Read more here about the new rule framework:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/918bca53037f408f91a2295d04ac16bc/e042e6cb0bae4718ba0e025825f73e88.html

 

here about configuration:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/918bca53037f408f91a2295d04ac16bc/828a6a386d0342319c64d22e24c62518.html?state=DRAFT&version=2402.502

 

Best,

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: Automatically renaming a PDF export file

entry.title: Re: Error while posting a parked document
entry.content: Check whether you need to carry out code corrections as recommended in OSS note 1661175, if you are in TAXINN

entry.title: Re: Functions Issue (By Me) Tab
entry.content:
OK, it seems like a bug but it depends what you think the proper behavior is.

As I see it, this is how it is working (I don't necessarily endorse this as the proper behavior):

  • There is the local template – this is what appears under By Me.
  • Then you have instances of the flow function. Each of these can be opened and customized.
  • After customizing one, you can "overwrite local template", which updates the version under "By Me" but not the existing instances. For you, this is improper behavior, even a bug, and overwriting local template should update all the existing flow functions. Or perhaps there should be a separate button. This is up to @Mari to answer.

Perhaps this is inconsistent with the way UI components work, though UI components have significant differences with flow function (e.g., UI components have component layout and styling).

If I update a component in the component template editor, it automatically updates all the instances of that component. I can create my own version of that component and then I have a default component and a customized one under "By Me". Perhaps flow functions should work differently, or perhaps its a bug (personally, I think there should be 2 options to update all instances or update the template).

entry.title: Accessing Excel from SAP Fiori Web Environment
entry.content:
I'm facing an issue with accessing Excel from a SAP Fiori web environment. While executing a program that utilizes OLE2 in SAP GUI, everything runs smoothly. However, when attempting to run the same program in Fiori, it fails due to lack of access permissions to Excel from the web interface.

It seems that the security restrictions in a web environment like Fiori prevent direct interactions with external applications like Excel via OLE2. As a result, users are unable to utilize Excel functionalities within Fiori.

What are the best practices or workarounds for enabling access to Excel from Fiori? Is there a way to overcome these permission restrictions or are there alternative methods to achieve similar functionalities within a web environment like Fiori?

I appreciate any insights or recommendations on how to address this issue effectively. Thank you.

entry.content: Thank you so much!!!

entry.title: Re: Number range for trans./event type WA in year 2011 do...
entry.content:
1)SOLUTION-

FOLLOW STEPS-

*)GO TO TCODE -OMBT-

 

SELECT-TRANSACTION EVENT TYPE -WA GI TRANSFER POSTING , OTHER GOODS MOVEMENT

SELECT -CREATE BUTTON

SELECT -MAINTAIN INTERVAL NUMBERS

save

www.learntosap.com

entry.title: How to Choose the Control Account When Creating Journal Entries by Using Import from Excel feature?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Is it possible to select the control account we are posting when using Import from Excel? We currently use DTW in order to achieve this, but some users are struggling to handle DTW and its technical approach, so importing from Excel seems more adequate and user-friendly, let's say.

I have tried couple different Excel templates but none of them are getting the desired outcome. The result is always booking the GL set up in the Business Partner, but sometimes we have to book a different one and this process doesn't seem to offer this possibility, unless we are missing something here.

Any thoughts?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: HANA PERSISTENCE encryption - how to check the progress?
entry.content:
Hi everyone
yesterday I executed, on the TENANTDB of a HANA system, the command for the encryption of the PERSISTENCE layer:

ALTER DATABASE <tid> PERSISTENCE ENCRYPTION ON;

After approximately 18 hours, the encryption is still in progress:

I also run the following query:

SELECT
HOST
, DATABASE_NAME
, PORT
, ENCRYPTION_ACTIVE
, DATA_CONVERSION_ACTIVE
FROM
SYS_DATABASES.M_PERSISTENCE_ENCRYPTION_STATUS;

So it would appear that the process is still ongoing.


I was wondering if there was a trace where I could check the status of the activity to understand if it's stuck or even estimate the total duration time.

Thank you all !

p.s. this tenant is approximately 4TB large

entry.title: Re: How to use attributes.ExampleCustomAttribute in a SAP BPA Process?
entry.content:
You can define Custom Variables in Variables tab of Process Details. 

Select the process canvas and open the "Process Details" panel on the right by clicking on "<<", just below buttons for zoom on the top right. 

Configure Process Variables | SAP Build Process Automation | SAP Help

  3. Deviating Holiday is not Displayed in Time File

entry.title: Deep inserts to entity sets are not supported in SAP BTP Android wizard generated code
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

when i am creating deep create using SAP BTP Android wizard generated code , i am getting the below error 

[-10213] Deep inserts to entity sets are not supported.

I attached the text file with Sample response , Can any one guide me how to do the deep insert 

Thanks,

Delli

entry.title: Re: Need Help on SBPA Concepts Regarding Variables
entry.content:
You would define an input variable to the process, and the app would collect the data from the user and send this as a parameter in the API call.

This does not require a form in SAP Build Process Automations.

And environment variable is set at deployment time and relates to having different values for different environments (generally dev/test/prod). It is not provided by the user or in the API call.

entry.title: Re: SAP Digital Manufacturing Cloud -Custom Plugin to display operation long text
entry.content: Why the plugin is duplicated? I have the same issue when I try to add another view in the designer folder

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 DI-API Set Price list Programmatically for Pur...
entry.content:
Hi,

The DI API does not mimic the behaviour of the client. Even if you would set the price list, it would not affect the prices of the Purchase Request.

You will have to determine and set the desired price for each row, in your code.

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: Extension of Standard Task Summary View with Custom fields
entry.content:
Hi Mahesh,

Thanks for detailed explanation.

We have a similar requirement on S4 HANA public cloud system. Can you please let us know how can we add custom fields into Task Summary view of the my inbox app when we choose Multi select option for mass actions.

entry.title: Re: join on LIPS and EKPO for open items
entry.content: Thank you. That works.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 DI-API Set Price list Programmatically for Pur...
entry.content: Hi, What setting determine which Price List is selected as default for the Purchase Request?

entry.title: Re: How to Choose the Control Account When Creating Journ...
entry.content:
Hi,

To my understanding you would have to set the 'Account Type' column to 'GL', and set the desired control account in the 'Account Code/BP Code' column:

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 DI-API Set Price list Programmatically for Pur...
entry.content:
The price is determined by the pricelist that was set for the vendor determined in the Vendor column. By default this vendor is the Preferred Vendor as set in the Item Master Data.

The default Price list that you see in the B1 client, is not a field. It is a tool to set all prices to conform to the given price list. This functionality is part of the client, not of the database.

entry.title: Where to find Product Related Answers for Work Zone
entry.content:
Hi
I am getting high level questions from customers for pilot project that I am implementing Work Zone for. They ask me high level questions and I am tasked with acquiring the correct information.

So I am not sure where to proceed, ticket-wise. I assume the component code would be LOD-SF-SWZ.

Any ideas of where I would seek assistance or advice?

Product Management Team?
I tried SAP for ME, Customer Interaction Center but all said it was out of their scope and not their responsibility.

The question (below) is regarding Work Zone Adv Ed and its release schedule https://me.sap.com/notes/0003303878
More high level questions may follow on so trying to also put a procedure in place.

Question: Is there any risk involved with upgrades and updates to Work Zone which occur bimonthly?
Seems like a simple question but I believe there next question is if they customize UI cards etc in Work Zone to suit there needs then will there be any revert or risk to customization with any new WZ release or maybe major BTP upgrade?

Appreciate any help with this!

Ger

entry.title: Re: How to create a value help for custom and released domain fixed values?
entry.content:
Hi, great blog, this CDS View should be delivered as the standard solution!!!

Just two corrections, fix the select to:

        SELECT * FROM @business_data AS data_source_fields
           WHERE (filter_condition_string)
           INTO TABLE @business_data
           UP TO @Max_index ROWS

 and remove the domain name from the dropdown with @UI.hidden : true

      @EndUserText.label     : 'domain name'
      @UI.hidden  : true
      key domain_name : sxco_ad_object_name;

entry.title: Differentiating Your Core ERP with SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
SAP S/4HANA is the ERP for every business need – from mission-critical operations to business model innovation. RISE with SAP helps you to move to SAP S/4HANA Cloud at your pace while safeguarding your existing SAP ERP investments. Benefit from a complete, modular solution with the AI and analytics capabilities to move your business forward with SAP S/4HANA.

Join this session to gain an understanding of:
 

• Moving the Business Suite functionality into the new world of SAP S/4HANA Cloud

• Goals, transition paths & tools available to support this transition

• Differentiating capabilities : Why SAP S/4HANA is superior to ECC

• Benefits for RISE customers

• Selected customer case studies

• Q&A

 

Speakers:
Ulrike Raidl, Vice President Solution Management SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud, SAP
David Yawalkar, Global Solution Owner RISE with SAP, S/4HANA Private Cloud, SAP

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 DI-API Set Price list Programmatically for Pur...
entry.content: The Vendor Column is blank and it will still pull a price from the zPrices price list, is this one the default because it is our first price list ? i need it to be a different price list by default when opening the form, or not auto fill at all.

entry.title: Re: HANA PERSISTENCE encryption - how to check the progress?
entry.content:
Can you please check if this helps?

2400005 - FAQ: SAP HANA Persistence - - > 9. Is it possible to encrypt the persistence level?

...
You can use SQL: "HANA_Security_PersistenceEncryption_Status" (SAP Note 1969700) to check for the current persistence encryption state. REENCRYPTION_ACTIVE = TRUE indicates that the re-encryption of data is still in progress.
...

Regards,
Laszlo

entry.title: Re: Unable Transfer Deletion Flag from S4 to GTS
entry.content: Maybe this link helps: Solved: Deletion-flag for product in GTS? - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Asking and Answering Questions in the Community After Migration
entry.content: Hi @jerryjanda ; thanks for your explanation. I guess, I will stop posting from now on. If I don't have control of my own content I am not willing to contribute. Just imagine a user by accident posts sensitive data (wrong screenshot) and hits enter and there is no way do delete this on your own. You just can wait and hope for the moderation team to delete it, but you cannot be sure it will deleted at all. And you don't know when.  Some of my content which was an answer to a comment looks now totally lost, useless and very strange, thanks to the migration. And now it will be there forever. The way I see it, SAP has more or less destroyed this platform, once again! Dumping almost everything in Technology Category is a really bad idea.

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite; Iterate over Value and write i...
entry.content: @filipagatic you would need to use gather and join, which for different XML formats is only a concatenation. In order to join at a specific place you would need a final mapping to combine the data, which also requires comparable keys in both XML outputs.

entry.title: Discover the Benefits of RISE with SAP beyond SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition
entry.content:
In this session, you will learn more about the components beyond S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition that are included in RISE with SAP. RISE with SAP is a holistic offering with S/4HANA Cloud Private edition Enterprise Management at its core, the solution bundles also contain a host of additional entitlements to support your intelligent enterprise transformation. The session provides details on the additional entitlements like SAP Signavio, CPEA credits, Sustainability, Supplier Network and many more, which are part of the different RISE with SAP packages and helps you to understand which package is best suited for you.


Speakers:
Ulrike Raidl, Vice President Solution Management SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud, SAP
David Yawalkar, Global Solution Owner RISE with SAP, S/4HANA Private Cloud, SAP

entry.title: Discover Transition Paths to SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
This session provides detailed information on the various transitions paths to SAP S/4HANA. We start off with a quick review of the current SAP S/4HANA Release Strategy. In addition, we'll explore the key differences between New Implementation, Conversion, and Selective Data Transformation approaches with two Selective Data Transformation implementation approaches discussed in detail. Moreover, business strategy examples are provided to illustrate real world transformation approaches.


Speaker:
Sheldon Edelstein, SAP S/4HANA Regional Implementation Group, SAP

entry.title: Generic date / todays date as default using consumption.filter.DefaultValue in ABAP CDS view
entry.content:
Is it possible to make the value in defaultValue generic? I want to pass the year of todays date instead of hard coding 2024?

Thanks!

entry.title: System allows to deliver more than the planned scheduling agreement quantity
entry.content:
We have an issue with scheduling agreement. When we check in the Planning delivery schedule, we were able to deliver more than was planned scheduling agreement which is not correct from our point of view.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: System allows to deliver more than the planned schedu...
entry.content:
Please see the checkbox setting on the item level shipping tab.

VBAP-UEBTK:

Unlimited Overdelivery Allowed
Indicates whether the customer allows unlimited over - and underdeliveries.

Dependencies
If the customer allows unlimited over - and underdeliveries, you cannot enter values in the fields that specify over- and underdelivery tolerance.

entry.title: Update on RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Pricing and Packaging
entry.content:
Join our session to get an overview about the available pricing options and entitlements for:

- RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition, base

- RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition, premium

- RISE with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, private edition, premium plus.


Speakers:
Bruno Angstmann, Director Strategic Pricing & Commercialization, SAP
Arne Neumann, SAP S/4HANA Solution Management & Go-to-Market, SAP

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: @JohnPhiri @trinhtieu - Experience in finance is a great combination with SAP skills. Please join us in an event to talk about the first free SAP Finance certification track here.

entry.title: Schedule a Publication in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Can someone please help me to understand the steps to schedule a publication in SAP Analytics Cloud.

I found some blogs regarding this, but that of too old. 
also is there any restriction for sending mail to non-SAC users? i mean is there any limit in count?

 

Regards,

Amith

entry.title: Re: statistical forecast key figure dissag issue for sale...
entry.content:
Hi Aman,

i created a KF - Proportional factor  and used this as a target key figure in calculate dissag factor forecast model where input kf is sales history based on this proportional factor got calculated and it is zero on combinations  where i do not have sales history and has a values only on combinations where i have sales history which i thought is correct apprach.

Later I used this P- factor  KF  in stat forecast for key figure for proportionality and ran the stat fcst at higher level - PRD family/Month level in order to get this dissag as per proportion but  i see stat fcst is still disaggregated to combinations(sales org) which has no sales history  

am i missing something ?your inputs is really appreciated

#IBP

entry.title: How to make fields Mandatory in solution manager - CRM UI
entry.content:
Any change created in Solman should require UAT Approver as PERSON_NAME, in all the normal changes UAT approve filed is empty for all CHARM which are imported into production for example PHONE_NUMBER


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to make fields Mandatory in solution manager - CR...
entry.content:
Please check below KBAs on how to make fields mandatory in webui

1699657 - How to make different fields mandatory in Solution Manager - CRM_UI?

or

The below KBA shows opposite scenario, if the field is not marked as mandatory in webui configuration but if the partner function should through an error if the field is not maintained with the partner name. You can set the minimum as "1" for the partner function which need to be filled mandatory by following below steps from the KBA.

2484106 - Why Does the Partner Function Require an Entry for a Field that is Not Flagged as Mandatory? - Solution Manager

entry.title: Re: SAP Utilities Roadmap 2024 and 2025
entry.content: Holger - great insights on roadmap 🙂

entry.title: Re: how to provide a single document with BAPI_MATPHYSINV_COUNT
entry.content: Just provide two records in the table parameter SERIALNUMBERS for the item with quantity 2.

entry.title: Re: Acct. 13100000 for trans./event key BSX, postable dir...
Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @mcp111 ,

I sent you an invite on Thursday, 22 February 2024. Subject line is "Digital skills initiative invite".  Note this is in your private messages on SAP Community - not email. Look at the top right of your screen you should see an envelope icon with a number on it.
